'''Ull Murub''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], Ull Murub was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After a time, he was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by an elder Jedi, and was soon stationed on the Sullustan [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. Though Murub longed for adventure, even believing that war would be exciting, he found himself more often than not performing mundane tasks, such as using his [[Force power/Legends|abilities]] to help citizens find lost [[Credit chip/Legends|cred sticks]].<ref name="GORW" />

While on Sullust, a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], formerly a [[Jedi Consular]], took notice of Murub and hoped to one day encourage his thirst for adventure, in order to pull him down the path toward the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].<ref name="GORW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
